## createPiPipeServer() function

Convenience factory that creates a `PiPipe`<!-- -->, installs routes, and starts listening.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function createPiPipeServer(
  config: PiPipeConfig,
  installers?: readonly RouteInstaller[],
): Promise<RunningServer>;
```

readonly [RouteInstaller](./pi-pipe.routeinstaller.md)<!-- -->\[\]

</td><td>

_(Optional)_ Optional route installers applied before listening.

</td></tr>
</tbody></table>

**Returns:**

Promise&lt;[RunningServer](./pi-pipe.runningserver.md)<!-- -->&gt;

Running server handle.

## Remarks

Prefer `new PiPipe()` when you want to keep a reusable instance around. This helper is useful when a one-shot startup function is enough.
